nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Grey-capped hemispingus
nodes.summary: The grey-capped hemispingus (Kleinothraupis reyi) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae that is endemic to Venezuela. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests where it is threatened by habitat loss. Description The species has a grey crown and does not have any supercilium. Upperparts are olive in colour and underparts are yellow. Habitat It is found on elevations between 2,200 metres (7,200 ft) and 3,000 metres (9,800 ft). References

nodes.name: Kleinothraupis
nodes.summary: Kleinothraupis（Kleinothraupis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Black-capped hemispingus、Orange-browed hemispingus、Parodi's hemispingus等4种鸟类。
